name: seg_depth_tradeoff_q5_fast
description: CH segment-size <-> circuit-depth tradeoff, fast q5 variant (A=0.4, nu=0.03, n_steps=40, T1=35/T2=25us stronger noise so the shallow circuits still decohere). Two relL2-vs-segment curves: NOISELESS (seam error only -> monotonically falling) and NOISY sim (seam + depth decoherence -> U-shaped optimum), with depth-per-circuit overlaid. Noisy paths are the completed run (curated from ~/q8020/2026-06-18/_325e9961); noiseless_path and reference are filled from burgers_ch_segdepth_noiseless_q5_fast.toml once it runs.
reference: FILL_ME: any one case dir from the noiseless run (carries the FTCS q5 final)
_todo: Run burgers_ch_segdepth_noiseless_q5_fast.toml, curate its 3 case dirs into results/, then set each point's noiseless_path and the top-level reference (the noiseless run's FTCS final).
